description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout. The structure features multiple rooms, including a large living area, bedrooms, and a kitchen, all arranged around a central corridor. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private outdoor area with a swimming pool and a wooden pergola, ideal for relaxation and gatherings. Large windows and sliding doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the exterior spaces. The exterior walls are predominantly white, complemented by sections of wood and glass, giving the building a clean and contemporary appearance. The property is surrounded by low boundary walls, with paved and green areas at the front and sides.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, open-plan interior, and a backyard featuring a pool and pergola. The design uses white walls, wood, and glass for a clean, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved area, and a glimpse of the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, large windows, and the connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, wooden pergola, and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional green space, side entrance, and the overall length of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large sliding glass doors and grouped side windows
